tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: Laboratory results are largely within normal limits. Notable findings include mild hypoglycemia (glucose 64 mg/dL) and low total CO₂ (20.3 mmol/L), which may suggest mild metabolic acidosis or compensation; clinical correlation is advised. Renal function, lipid profile, and microalbumin/creatinine ratio are unremarkable. No evidence of significant renal or metabolic derangement.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
